title: New Zealand API Standard (Draft)
description: Comprehensive technical standard for New Zealand government agencies developing APIs, covering the complete lifecycle from design through operations. Establishes mandatory requirements and best practices for REST, GraphQL, AsyncAPI, and gRPC implementations, with emphasis on security, authentication, and consumer-driven design.
